approvalNotes: Approved unattended Foundation continuation after OPS-003.
Make planning attrition a first-class Agent Engine input using existing source-backed Freedom boundaries.
Do not mutate Google Sheets, Drive permissions, ClickUp, FUB, finance, credentials, OAuth scopes, provider config, sends, or broad Freedom workbook surfaces.
Close only with focused proof, System Health, repeated-failure gate, backlog hygiene, foundation:verify, and process:foundation-ship.
